channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Military Sex parallels
item.description: Q: You have mentioned that there are parallels between the maintenance of sex and that of a military in fighting shape. What are they and how are they geopolitically relevant? Sex In prokaryotes sex is casual. They exchange genetic material routinely, often across distant phylogenies, because DNA is not just a genetic molecule but also a structural molecule that holds together their biofilms. One of the defining events that marked the origin of eukaryotes was the institutionalization of sex.
